top_signals.title: Same Fear, Different Fallout: Oil and Gold's Diverging Collapse
top_signals.summary: Gold and oil spent five months moving like they were tied to the same rope. Both caught a bid from fear that war between the United States and Iran would spiral into something markets couldn’t quite price, and both are unwinding that trade in the same quarter.  Look closer, though, and the two collapses have stopped sharing a cause. Gold fell for a third straight session Wednesday, dropping to $3,983.07 an ounce and touching its lowest level since November. The metal sank roughly 14% in the second quarter, its steepest quarterly decline…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Fall on Korean Chip Selloff, Oil Dips: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks fell for the first time in four days after a selloff in chipmakers revived concerns that the artificial intelligence-driven rally may have gone too far, too fast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Tumble 6% as AI Jitters Hurt Chipmakers
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks slumped as Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to sell computing power raised questions over excess in AI capacity, driving a selloff in chipmakers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin bear market ‘dead’ after first TD9 reversal signal since July 2022 fires
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin bear-market bottom signs appear as the TD9 indicator mirrors the final stages of the 2022 BTC price downtrend.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Mr John Wrottesley Appointed as New General Manager of International Cable Protection Committee (ICPC)
top_signals.summary: The International Cable Protection Committee (ICPC) announces the official appointment of Mr John Wrottesley as the new General Manager of the global organisation to take over from Mr Ryan Wopschall who is stepping down after six years in the position. This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260701036941/en/ Wrottesley first joined the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix shares tumble over 7% as chip rout spreads from Wall Street
top_signals.summary: Shares of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix plummeted more than 7% in early Thursday trading.

top_signals.title: ‘We desperately need legislation that includes an agreement on ethics:’ Trump financial filing adds urgency to crypto bill negotiations
top_signals.summary: Trump's financial disclosure, revealing millions in crypto-related income, is adding urgency to write ethics restrictions into a crypto bill.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
